ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the facility */,
  "url" TEXT /* Website URL of the facility */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility */,
  "service_facility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is a service facility */,
  "dedicated_genome_centre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is a dedicated genome center */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "contact_mask" TEXT /* Masking for contact details */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the facility */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the facility is located */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the facility was created in the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the facility data was created */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address associated with the facility for updates */,
  "update_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the update if the facility details were revised */,
  "processed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the facility is processed */,
  "capacity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the capacity of the facility */,
  "akismet_spam" INTEGER /* Flag for spam detection */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus of the facility */,
  "technology_used" TEXT /* Technologies used by the facility */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Genomic Sequencing) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service offered */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "service_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the staff works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., technician, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the facility's location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the facility is located */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with this capacity information */,
  "capacity_summary" TEXT /* General summary of the facility's capacity */,
  "max_samples_per_day" INTEGER /* Maximum number of samples the facility can process per day */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features available in the facility */,
  "instrumentation" TEXT /* Instruments available at the facility */,
  "staff_expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the staff members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact log entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with this log entry */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of contact with the facility */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the contact made */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the facility (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_updates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
